title: California Scents Jelly Belly Blueberry Mini Vent 3D Gel Duo Pack Air Freshener Car Fragrance, Green
features: SMELLS EXACTLY LIKE YOUR FAVOURITE JELLY BELLY BEAN - bursting with beantastic flavour, this car air freshener smells as good as it tastes with the sweet scent of blueberry balanced with green basil, vanilla and tonka for a fragrance explosion in your car

CLIPS EASILY INTO CAR AIR VENTS - designed to brighten your day and lift your spirits, these 3D car scents echo the iconic shape of Jelly Belly beans in vivid 'blueberry' tones that make them just as fun and fruity as the real thing

DELICIOUS SCENT LASTS UP TO 30 DAYS - clip your Jelly Belly car air fresheners into the vents in your car and enjoy balanced, long-lasting fragrance as their fruity flavour is slowly released, banishing unpleasant odours, and keeping your ride smelling sweet

GREAT GIFT TO A NEW DRIVER - perfect for congratulating a friend who's passed their test or got their first car, these vibrant car air fresheners for men and women are a fun way to say goodbye to L-plates and hello to mouth-watering Jelly Belly flavour

GENUINE JELLY BELLY CAR FRESHENERS - world famous since 1976 for its full-bodied jelly beans in a menu of exotic, true-to-life flavours, Jelly Belly car air fresheners capture the essence of the bean to personalise your car the Jelly Belly way
description: From the manufacturer Jelly Belly Car Air Fresheners – There’s Revolution in the Air Bursting with beantastic flavour, Jelly Belly car air fresheners really do smell every bit as good as the beans taste. Jam-packed with tangy top notes and smooth base notes, each perfectly balanced scent captures the essence of the bean for a full-bodied fragrance explosion in your car. The fun doesn’t stop there... echoing the iconic shape of Jelly Belly beans, these air vent car scents look just as fresh and fruity as the real thing, and with more than 20 mouth-watering fragrances in the range, it couldn’t be easier to brighten your day the Jelly Belly way. #BeSeenWithTheBean PERFECTLY BALANCED SCENT ICONIC JELLY BELLY BEAN DESIGN PERFECT FOR YOUR CAR, HOME, OFFICE Jelly Belly Blueberry Duo Vent Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry 2D Hanging Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry 3D Hanging Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry Gel Can Air Freshener Jelly Belly Tangerine Car Vent Air Freshener Jelly Belly Island Punch Jewel 3D Hanging Air Freshener Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 12,398 4.2 out of 5 stars 3,476 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,680 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,512 4.2 out of 5 stars 20 4.6 out of 5 stars 28 Price £4.12 £ 4 . 12 £2.40 £ 2 . 40 £3.00 £ 3 . 00 — no data — no data — no data Product Type Duo Air Vent Freshener 2D Jelly Bean Hanging 3D Jelly Bean Hanging Gel Can Air Freshener Spray Air Freshener 3D Jelly Bean Hanging Usage Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Quantity Duo Air Fresheners Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Long Lasting 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days Genuine Jelly Belly ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
